posts.title: Getting Started with SAP BTP Core Services API
posts.description: Overview of the REST APIs for managing SAP BTP global accounts, subaccounts, directories, and entitlements programmatically.

posts.title: SAP Authorization and Trust Management Service (XSUAA) API Guide
posts.description: How to use OAuth 2.0-based authorization and trust management for SAP BTP, including client credentials and JWT token issuance.

posts.title: Connectivity and Destinations on SAP BTP
posts.description: Guide to using the SAP Destination Service REST API for managing connectivity to remote services and on-premise systems.

posts.title: SAP Integration Suite API Documentation
posts.description: Comprehensive API documentation for SAP Integration Suite covering cloud integration, API management, event mesh, and integration advisor.

posts.title: SAP AI Core: Training and Deployment REST API
posts.description: REST API reference for SAP AI Core enabling AI/ML model training, deployment, and inference within the SAP BTP ecosystem.

posts.title: SAP Service Manager API: Multi-Environment Service Lifecycle
posts.description: How to use the SAP Service Manager REST API to manage service instances and bindings across SAP BTP Cloud Foundry and Kubernetes environments.

posts.title: Proactive Monitoring with SAP Alert Notification Service API
posts.description: Configuring and receiving alerts about SAP BTP service events using the Alert Notification Service REST API for incident response and budget monitoring.
